name: focus-cycles
description: Focus Cycles — built on Sebastian Marshall's Work Cycles framework.
author: Bud

scripts.release-zip: rm -rf /tmp/fc-sign && mkdir -p /tmp/fc-sign && ditto --norsrc --noextattr --noacl "dist/Focus Cycles-darwin-arm64/Focus Cycles.app" "/tmp/fc-sign/Focus Cycles.app" && codesign --force --deep --sign - "/tmp/fc-sign/Focus Cycles.app" && codesign --verify --deep --strict "/tmp/fc-sign/Focus Cycles.app" && cd /tmp/fc-sign && ditto -c -k --keepParent "Focus Cycles.app" /tmp/FocusCycles-mac-arm64.zip && echo 'Signed zip at /tmp/FocusCycles-mac-arm64.zip'
